Defendant Elmo Mugnani'S Notice And Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff Claude Laws To Respond To Form Interrogatories, Deem Matters Admitted, And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Claude Laws, Tel.415.947.0193, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf;
Jonathan Bornstein, Esq. of Bornstein & Bornstein, Tel. 415.409.7611, for defendants and moving parties.

Both parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. Plaintiff did not give notice that he will appear to contest the tentative ruling. The matter was not argued. After hearing, the court adopted the tentative ruling, as follows: Defendant Elmo Mugnani's Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff Claude Laws To Respond To Form Interrogatories, Deem Matters Admitted, And Imposing Monetary Sanctions is granted. No opposition filed. Sanctions awarded in the amount of $750 (reduced from $950 as requested in notice because the motion is unopposed). Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Mtn For Judgmnt On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Oct-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Liana Ayrapetyna, Esq of Bornstein & Bornstein (415-409-7611) for Defendant and moving party Elmo Mugnani et al.
No other Appearance.

Defendant's oral 170.6 peremptory challenge to Judge Wong is Denied. The Court adopts it's tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS ELMO MUGNANI, JOHN MUGNANI and LAW OFFICES OF BORNSTEIN & BORNSTEIN's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Denied. Complaint alleges sufficient facts regarding landlord and landlord's agents/attorneys failure to arrange for the retrieval of Plaintiff's personal property after an eviction. Complaint is not so uncertain that defendants cannot answer it. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

Amended Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Sep-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

No appearances.

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:
